heading: We transform brands
into memorable
experiences.
hero.subheading: We combine strategy, design and culture to create brands that shape markets.

servicos.heading: Visual
servicos.intro: Visual identity is the essence of your brand translated visually. It's not about being beautiful. It's about being recognized at the right moment, for the right reason, in a way only your brand can.

entregas.title: A brand people remember.
entregas.desc: Logo, colors, typography and the entire visual universe of your brand designed to create an identity that sticks. You know that brand you remember effortlessly? That's what we build.

entregas.title: Consistency that builds trust.
entregas.desc: Inconsistency is silent, but clients feel it. A brand that shows up the same everywhere communicates something no copy can: credibility.

entregas.title: The feeling that your brand has arrived.
entregas.desc: There's a moment when the client looks at the brand and thinks: this truly represents who we are. That's the feeling we work to deliver.

entregas.title: Positioning that occupies a clear space.
entregas.desc: We discover where your brand has the most strength and build from there. No guesswork, no copying competitors. Only what makes sense for your business and the audience you want to attract.

processo.heading: Development Stages
entregas: Logo in RGB and CMYK variations in AI, PNG, PDF and SVG formats
Color palette in RGB, CMYK and Pantone (optional)

etapas.desc: Naming is the strategic starting point for building your brand. A good name goes beyond a simple word: it communicates your business's essence, creates a connection with the audience and stands out in the market.

steps.title: Immersion & Research
steps.desc: We analyze the company, its audience and differentiators, as well as the market and competition, defining the brand's strategic values and identity.

steps.title: Creation & Development
steps.desc: The name will be developed strategically, with availability checks and phonetic analysis to ensure a unique, memorable name suited to the market.

steps.title: Presentation & Refinement
steps.desc: A report with 3 to 5 name suggestions will be delivered, each accompanied by a conceptual rationale.

steps.title: Final Delivery
steps.desc: The validated final name will be delivered along with registration guidance and domain and social media profile suggestions.

etapas.desc: Having a well-defined strategy before starting is essential to ensure the correct brand positioning, add value and attract the right audience.

steps.title: Briefing
steps.desc: At the start of the project, we send a briefing so you can share details about your company, target audience and persona.

steps.title: Research
steps.desc: After the briefing, we conduct detailed research on the brand's segment, looking for relevant references.

steps.title: Brand DNA
steps.desc: With the briefing complete and research done, we define the brand's personality, aligned with its DNA.

steps.title: Moodboard
steps.desc: We begin building the moodboard, selecting visual and graphic references that inspire the project.

steps.title: Competitors
steps.desc: We analyze competitor positioning to identify differentiation opportunities and create a unique strategy.

etapas.desc: With the strategy defined, we begin creating the brand's Visual Identity — logo, color palette, typography and other graphic components, always aligned with the established strategy.

steps.title: Colors
steps.desc: We define the Visual Identity color palette, specifying tones in RGB, CMYK and optionally Pantone.

steps.title: Typography
steps.desc: The visual identity is composed of two typefaces: the primary, used in the logo, and the complementary, used in institutional materials.

steps.title: Logo
steps.desc: We move on to creating the logo and all its variations: vertical, horizontal and circular versions.

steps.title: Supporting elements
steps.desc: Visual elements such as patterns, textures and designs that reinforce and complement the Visual Identity.

steps.title: Applications
steps.desc: We use mockups to visualize the brand in real contexts, such as packaging, signage and graphic materials.

steps.title: Presentation
steps.desc: We develop the final PDF presentation with a detailed recorded explanation, facilitating project review and approval.

quemSou.title:
BRUNO BRAGAIA,
30 YEARS OLD.
quemSou.p1: I hold a degree in Advertising and Marketing from Universidade Presbiteriana Mackenzie, with specialization in essential tools for design and visual creation, including Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator and Figma.
quemSou.p2: I also completed the ID Class course for Visual Identities, taught by Marcelo Kimura, which allows me to develop visual identity projects with both technical and creative grounding.
